title: Shattering Nutty French Pepper Fritters
description: A delicious and crunchy French-inspired snack featuring red pepper, almonds, and Parmesan cheese. Perfect for the holiday season or a weeknight treat.
instructions: In a medium bowl, whisk together almond flour, Parmesan cheese, parsley, garlic, thyme, salt, black pepper, and paprika.
In a separate bowl, whisk the egg and add the chopped red bell pepper.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and pliable.
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces and roll each piece into a ball.
Flatten each ball slightly into a disk shape.
Dip each disk into the beaten egg and then coat in panko breadcrumbs.
Heat the olive oil in a large non-stick skillet over medium-high heat.
Fry the fritters for 2-3 minutes on each side until golden brown and crispy.
Drain the fritters on paper towels and let cool for 5 minutes.
